headline: Megan Thee Pancake Posts POV Video About 'The Anxiety Of Sending A Risky Text', Internet Loses It
summary: The 12-second video showing her typing, deleting, typing again, then throwing her phone across the room has 400M views.
fullBody: Megan Thee Pancake's latest POV video has captured the millennial experience perfectly. The clip shows her typing a message, deleting it, typing again, showing it to her dog for approval, then ultimately sending a thumbs-up emoji instead. 'Why did I just watch this 47 times?' one user commented. The video has spawned thousands of reaction videos, including one from a therapist who said 'this is why my practice is full.'
